channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Canva launches Canva AI for coding, photo editing and spreadsheets
item.description: Canva just announced its “biggest product launch yet” with huge AI-powered upgrades for Visual Suite 2.0.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Amazon CEO says it has to operate like the “world's largest startup”, urges AI investment
item.description: Jassy sees seven commonalities between Amazon and startups as he spells out the future for the company.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CIO Sharon Mandell transforms Juniper Networks for the AI era
item.description: CIOs have elevated their stature in the business by driving digital transformations for nearly a decade. Now, top-level IT chiefs are taking this formula a step further by putting digital initiatives to work in helping transform the business itself.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Teen goes from 10 nightly seizures to zero with brain implant
item.description: The NeuroOne OneRF Ablation System is a new device with FDA-cleared technology designed for both diagnosing and treating neurological disorders in one procedure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google's new Android update will give your devices a battery boost – plus a helpful new feature for Google Wallet
item.description: There's a new update to Google Play services heading to devices, and we should see some tangible benefits.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Infoblox, Google Cloud partner to protect hybrid and multicloud enterprise resources
item.description: Infoblox and Google Cloud announced a partnership that powers new products from each company that they say will help enterprise organizations accelerate their cloud adoption with advanced networking and security capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon may be about to spend $15 billion on new US warehouses
item.description: Amazon is gearing up to spend $15 billion opening up 80 new US logistics facilities to support its ecommerce business.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple has few incentives to start making iPhones in U.S., despite Trump's trade war with China
item.description: President Donald Trump’s administration has been predicting its barrage of tariffs targeting China will push Apple into manufacturing the iPhone in the U.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How video games became peak IP
item.description: The Minecraft movie is crass, dumb, and barely coherent. It also just made almost $163 million at the domestic box office over its opening weekend. Video game adaptations have been on a hot streak in recent years. In 2023, The Super Mario Bros.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Alphabet can’t shake off AI concerns even with low multiple
item.description: Persistent concerns that Alphabet Inc. has fallen behind in the artificial intelligence supremacy race has weighed on the stock this year, and not even the cheapest earnings multiple in about two years, or limited risk from tariffs, has been enough to entice investors.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: OpenAI countersues Elon Musk in legal dispute over ChatGPT maker's business ambitions
item.description: OpenAI is suing Elon Musk for unfair competition and interfering with its business relationships with investors and customers, escalating a legal battle between the ChatGPT maker and the billionaire who helped bankroll the artificial intelligence startup a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft says it's “slowing or pausing” some data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Agentic AI – Ongoing coverage of its impact on the enterprise
item.description: Over the next few years, agentic AI is expected to bring not only rapid technological breakthroughs, but a societal transformation, redefining how we live, work and interact with the world. And this shift is happening quickly.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: The dangers of oversharing with AI tools
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: One Tech Tip: Locking down your device when crossing borders
item.description: Travelers should prepare for extra scrutiny of devices when crossing borders, especially when entering the U.S. Experts say 100% privacy might be impossible but there things you can do to make it harder for someone to see your private data.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ignoring Wall Street, Apple gets busy on Vision Pro 2.0
item.description: While politicians everywhere seem to be doing their best to make everything pretty difficult, the North Star for Apple remains what it always has been: creating products people seem to love. That’s what got the company through (and out of) tough times before.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Shopify CEO: No new hires, unless you prove AI can't do the job
item.description: "Teams must demonstrate why they cannot get what they want done using AI," Shopify CEO Tobi Lutke wrote in a memo to employees.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kooiman, The Hill

item.title: 200 million social media records leaked in major X data breach
item.description: X hit with massive data breach with 200 million records leaked, including emails. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers seven tips to help protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senators probe Google-Anthropic, Microsoft-OpenAI deals over antitrust concerns
item.description: Democratic Senators Elizabeth Warren and Ron Wyden have launched a formal inquiry into partnerships between tech giants Google and Microsoft, and AI startups, demanding detailed information about arrangements they fear may be circumventing antitrust scrutiny while consolidating power in the rapidly
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: From training dogs to intelligent machines: Here’s how reinforcement learning is teaching AI
item.description: Understanding intelligence and creating intelligent machines are grand scientific challenges of our times. The ability to learn from experience is a cornerstone of intelligence for machines and living beings alike.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: For safeguarding critical infrastructure, stronger governance alone isn’t a magic bullet
item.description: Proposed TSA security requirements mark a step in the right direction for ICS/OT security. However, stricter compliance alone isn’t enough. The post For safeguarding critical infrastructure, stronger governance alone isn’t a magic bullet first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Scientists genetically engineer wolves with white hair and muscular jaws like the extinct dire wolf
item.description: Three genetically engineered wolves that may resemble extinct dire wolves are trotting, sleeping and howling in an undisclosed secure location in the U.S., according to the company that aims to bring back lost species.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA LARSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft workers say they've been fired after 50th anniversary protest over Israel contract
item.description: Microsoft has fired two employees who interrupted the company's 50th anniversary celebration to protest its work supplying artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military, according to a group representing the workers.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Amanda Nguyen to become first Vietnamese American woman in space
item.description: Nguyen will join Aisha Bowe, Gayle King, Katy Perry, Kerianne Flynn and Lauren Sánchez on an all-female flight.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: The best ways to give your old Android a second life
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how you can creatively repurpose your old unused Android devices, which are full of potential and hidden value.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft employees protest at 50th anniversary party over Israel contract
item.description: A pro-Palestinian protest by Microsoft employees interrupted the company’s 50th anniversary celebration Friday, the latest backlash over the tech industry’s work to supply artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: TikTok deal pulled after Trump tariff announcement
item.description: A finalized TikTok deal was pulled Thursday after President Trump announced massive new tariffs against China, a source familiar with the negotiations told The Hill. Trump was poised to sign an executive order approving a deal that would have seen TikTok’s U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Nintendo delays Switch 2 US preorders over Trump tariffs
item.description: Nintendo said U.S. preorders of its Switch 2 console will not take place on April 9 as it assesses tariff implications.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation
